query: /* select#1 */ select `testdb`.`products`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`testdb`.`products`.`price` AS `price` from `testdb`.`products` where (`testdb`.`products`.`category_id` = 5) order by `testdb`.`products`.`price`
operation: Covering index lookup on products using idx_cat_price (category_id=5)
